item.title: JFowlerESPN: Ian Rapoport reposteó Jeremy Fowler @JFowlerESPN · 1h The Titans plan to pick up OG Peter Skoronski’s fifth-year option,
item.description:
Ian Rapoport reposteó Jeremy Fowler @JFowlerESPN · 1h The Titans plan to pick up OG Peter Skoronski’s fifth-year option, per source.
This sets up Skoronski, the team’s No. 11 overall pick in 2023, to make $19.07M in 2027. 41 173 1 mil 282 mil
